nodes.name: Webhook - Video Request
nodes.notes: Mottar payload fra trigger-n8n Edge Function. Validerer X-VideoMill-Auth header.

nodes.name: Sett status: queued
nodes.notes: Oppdaterer eksisterende video (ikke lager ny). React-appen har allerede laget video-raden.

nodes.name: Groq - Generate Script
nodes.notes: Groq LLaMA 3.1 genererer manus. Bruker 'promp' fra payload som instruksjoner.

nodes.name: Voice Map
nodes.notes: Mapper voice_id til edge-tts format. Støtter norske og engelske stemmer.

nodes.name: Generate Voiceover
nodes.notes: edge-tts genererer voiceover. Bruker tts_voice fra Voice Map-steget.

nodes.name: Upload All Formats
nodes.notes: Laster opp alle videoformater til Supabase Storage.

nodes.name: Status: complete + URLs
nodes.notes: Oppdaterer video med status=complete og lagrer video-URLer. Trigger Realtime push til frontend.

nodes.name: Cron - Trending Topics (6t)
nodes.notes: Henter nye trender fra Ollama hvert 6. time.

parameters.jsonBody: {"model": "llama3", "prompt": "Analyze current trending topics for viral short-form video content in 2026. Return exactly 16 topics as a JSON array with NO other text. Each topic must be an object: {\"title\": string, \"category\": string (one of: tech/motivation/history/science/crime/finance/health/mystery), \"heat\": string (one of: fire/hot/rising), \"reason\": string (why it's trending, max 80 chars), \"tags\": string[] (3-5 tags), \"rank\": number (1-16), \"platform\": string (one of: tiktok/youtube/instagram), \"target_audience\": string (who the content is for)}. Return ONLY valid JSON array, no markdown.", "stream": false}

nodes.name: Parse Trends → DB-format
nodes.notes: Mapper Ollama-felt til trending_topics DB-kolonner (rank→viral_score, heat→heat_level, reason→growth_stat)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify($input.all().map(i => ({...i.json, active: true, updated_at: new Date().toISOString()}))) }}

nodes.name: Insert nye trender
nodes.notes: Setter inn nye trender → Supabase Realtime pusher til frontend umiddelbart

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ video_id: $json[0].id, user_id: $json[0].user_id, topic: $json[0].topic || $json[0].title, promp: $json[0].promp || '', voice_id: $json[0].voice_id || 'nb-NO-Pernille', platform: $json[0].platform || 'tiktok', aspect_ratio: $json[0].aspect_ratio || '9:16', language: $json[0].language || 'nb', target_audience: $json[0].target_audience || 'general', action: 'retry' }) }}
